_meta.description: What fraction of each NEVI state's total public DC-fast-charging (DCFC) fleet the 216 NEVI-funded stations represent. Built to test whether attributing Paren's state-level reliability average (measured across the whole state DCFC fleet) to just the NEVI subset is reasonable.
_meta.status: PARTIAL - 11 of 21 NEVI states. Remaining 10 (MN, NM, NY, OH, PA, RI, TX, UT, VA, WI) blocked on AFDC/NLR DEMO_KEY rate limiting - empty response body, no error, same signature as other DEMO_KEY throttling documented in CLAUDE.md. Retried NY after a 40s pause, still blocked. Needs a real (non-DEMO_KEY) API key to finish - see CLAUDE.md Open decisions (already a pending item from 2026-07-19).
_meta.source: AFDC/NLR API (developer.nlr.gov/api/alt-fuel-stations/v1.json), fuel_type=ELEC, ev_charging_level=dc_fast, per-state total_results field. NEVI counts from data/nevi_stations_current.csv.
